zh.Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Pantulf於大約1227年出生在英國史洛普爾維姆時，她的父親William Pantulf58歲，母親Hawise FitzWarin18歲。她於1283年5月9日之前與Walter de Hopton結婚。她去世於1289年5月6日在英國史洛普爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Pantulf于大约1227年出生在英国史洛普爾維姆时，她的父亲William Pantulf58岁，母亲Hawise FitzWarin18岁。她于1283年5月9日之前与Walter de Hopton结婚。她去世于1289年5月6日在英国史洛普爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Pantulf was born about 1227, in Wem, Shropshire, England, her father, William Pantulf, was 58 and her mother, Hawise FitzWarin, was 18. She married Walter de Hopton before 9 May 1283. She died on 6 May 1289, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Pantulf est née environ 1227, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Pantulf, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Hawise FitzWarin, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Hopton avant 9 mai 1283. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1289, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Pantulf um 1227 in Wem, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pantulf 58 und ihre Mutter Hawise FitzWarin 18. Sie hat vor 9. Mai 1283 Walter de Hopton geheiratet. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1289 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Pantulf è nata il circa 1227 nel Wem, Shropshire, England, sua padre, William Pantulf, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Hawise FitzWarin, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Hopton prima del 9 maggio 1283. Morì il 6 maggio 1289, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Pantulfが約1227年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで生まれた時，父William Pantulfは58歳，母Hawise FitzWarinは18歳であった。1283年5月9日以前にWalter de Hoptonと結婚した。彼女は1289年5月6日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Pantulf(이)가 대략 1227년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pantulf(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise FitzWarin(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1283년 5월 9일 이전 Walter de Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1289년 5월 6일 영국 슈럽실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Pantulf nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pantulf, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Hawise FitzWarin, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Hopton antes 9 de maio de 1283. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1289, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Pantulf родилась около 1227 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pantulf было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise FitzWarin, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Hopton перед 9 май 1283 г. Она умерла 6 мая 1289 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Pantulf nació aproximadamente 1227, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pantulf, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Hawise FitzWarin, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Walter de Hopton antes de 9 de mayo de 1283. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1289, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
